title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 23 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 23 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 23 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures open lower and go higher, the main contract closed 822.5, an increase only 0.43% throughout the day; but as the diskcontinues to decline. some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills purchasing enthusiasm are not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 930-950 yuan/mt; prices are mixed today over yesterday.
